name: TRM Labs
description: Blockchain intelligence and crypto AML API for real-time transaction monitoring and risk scoring.

seo.title: TRM Labs — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: TRM Labs: Blockchain intelligence and crypto AML API for real-time transaction monitoring and risk scoring.

when_to_use: Real-time crypto transaction AML screening for exchanges
Blockchain intelligence API for VASP regulatory compliance
Illicit fund tracing for law enforcement investigations
FATF Travel Rule wallet screening for virtual asset providers
Exposure risk scoring for DeFi protocol compliance teams

pros: Real-time KYT across a wide range of chains
Strong with regulators and law enforcement
Rich typologies library and research output
cons: Enterprise pricing out of reach for small teams
Explainability of risk scores can be opaque
Broad coverage means more false positives
review.verdict: Top-tier crypto AML API that credibly competes with Chainalysis; priced for serious VASPs and banks.
review.best_for: Exchanges, banks and agencies needing real-time crypto transaction monitoring with broad coverage
review.not_for: Small crypto startups or P2P traders better served by cheaper per-check screening like AMLBot

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
